title: Bert's June 2022 Dividend Income Summary
text: We received $2,818.44 in June dividend income. This was a 21.79% year over year increase. Individual dividend growth stocks paid us $1,686.78. This represented 60% of the total dividend income received. ETFs and mutual funds accounted for 40% of our total dividend income for the month.

title: T Rowe Price Equity Income Fund Enters Meta Position in 2nd Quarter
text: T Rowe Price Equity Income Fund (Trades, Portfolio), part of Baltimore-based T. Rowe Price Group Inc. ( TROW , Financial), disclosed that its top five trades during the second quarter included a new position in Meta Platforms Inc. ( META , Financial), a boost to its holding in News Corp. ( NWSA , Financial), the closure of its stake in UnitedHealth Group Inc. ( UNH , Financial) and reductions to its positions in MetLife Inc. ( MET , Financial) and Elevance Health Inc. ( ELV , Financial).

title: Cleerly raises nearly $200 million in fundraise led by T. Rowe Price, Fidelity
text: Cleerly, a New York-based health tech startup, has raised $192 million in a funding round led by investment firms T. Rowe Price and Fidelity Management & Research Company LLC.

title: T. Rowe Price: Getting Closer To Strong Buy Territory
text: Shares of T. Rowe Price have had a rough first half of 2022, with a YTD decline near 40%. Despite a decline in AUM for 2022, T. Rowe Price still has impressive margins and a rock-solid balance sheet.

title: T. Rowe Price: Short-Term Headwinds But Huge Long-Term Upside
text: T. Rowe Price is a great position to own for dividend growth investors. The company has increased the dividend for 36 years and counting. The company is largely tied to the stock market performance, so with the great markets in a bear market, TROW has been under pressure.

title: T. Rowe Price: Attractive Valuation And Dividend Yield
text: T. Rowe Price is one of the leading asset managers in the U.S. The company's funds perform well versus peers and benchmarks. The 2022 bear market has increased the yield to 4%+ and brought down the valuation. Dividend safety is excellent.

title: T. Rowe Price: High Dividend, Unclear Short-Term Future
text: T. Rowe Price is a well-known financial services company. In recent months, its stock price has dropped while its dividend yield has increased.
